content: Custom device flow in Next.js: Create /api/device/code (POST, generates device_code + user_code, stores in DB with status=pending), /api/device/token (POST, polls by device_code, returns pending/approved/denied/expired), /api/device/approve (POST, auth-gated, sets status=approved with userId). Avoids full OAuth lib - just DB-backed state machine. Key: token endpoint is UNAUTHENTICATED (daemon polls it), approve endpoint is AUTHENTICATED (user in browser). Pattern aligns with existing /api/pairing/exchange approach already in codebase.
